title: description
A Visit to Grandmother's House: Learn greetings and family words through a conversation between a child and their grandmother

title: Tau! Bo dẹkị. Ẹmẹnẹ tị ama ye-a?
A Visit to Grandmother's House: Grandchild! Come in. How is your town?

title: Anị ama ye kịịrịị. Dau mọ inạ ye send ẹmẹnẹ.
A Visit to Grandmother's House: Our town is fine. Father and mother sent me.

title: Kịịrịị! Mu titẹ. Anị timi fịrị bọ today.
A Visit to Grandmother's House: Good! Sit down. We will work together today.
